data.title: Bitcoin ancient whale transfers the last remaining 40,000 BTC to Galaxy Digital
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, Bitcoin whale transferred the last 40,192 BTC (worth about $4.83 billion) to Galaxy Digital this morning.
In the past four days, this Bitcoin OG (old player) has transferred a total of 80,201 BTC (worth about $9.6 billion) to Galaxy Digital.

data.title: SharpLink Gaming once again increased its holdings by 18,712 ETH
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, SharpLink Gaming added 18,712 ETH (worth approximately $65.45 million) to its Ethereum strategy reserve this morning.
The company currently holds a total of 326,074 ETH, with a total value of approximately $1.14 billion.

data.title: Meta Platforms Appoints New Threads Platform Head Amid AI Talent Acquisition
data.description:
According to PANews, Meta Platforms has appointed Connor Hayes as the head of its Threads platform. This move comes as the company continues to strengthen its leadership team.

In addition to this appointment, Meta Platforms has reportedly recruited two AI experts from Apple, further enhancing its capabilities in artificial intelligence. This strategic acquisition is part of Meta's ongoing efforts to bolster its technological expertise and innovation in the competitive tech industry.

data.title: Ripple co-founder transfers $26 million in XRP to Coinbase
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: As XRP approaches its all-time high, Ripple co-founder and executive chairman Chris Larsen has transferred $26 million worth of XRP to Coinbase. (Decrypt)

data.title: Will Bitcoin Treasury Companies Kickstart the Next Crypto Bear Market?
data.description:
Corporate Bitcoin adoption continues its proliferation as more companies pursue accumulation strategies for their treasuries. Firms can benefit from capital appreciation, diversification, and an inflation hedge if executed properly.   However, not all Bitcoin acquisition strategies are created equal. If a company’s sole purpose is to hold BTC without sufficient resources or scale, it can risk total collapse during extended bear market periods
source: https://beincrypto.com/bitcoin-treasury-companies-trigger-crypto-bear-market/

data.title: Senator Warren sends demand letters to S&P Global, Moody’s, and Fitch Ratings
data.description:
Sen. Elizabeth Warren has called for more scrutiny of the booming private-credit market. On Thursday, she sent letters to S&P Global Ratings, Moody’s Ratings, and Fitch Ratings, asking for information about how they score the riskiness of private-credit products. In her letter to the ratings agencies, Warren said that overly optimistic credit ratings contributed to […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sen-warren-letters-to-sp-global-moodys-fitch/

data.title: Pundit Warns XRP Investors To Not Make This Grave Mistake This Cycle
data.description:
A powerful message has emerged from a recent episode of the Good Evening Crypto YouTube show that urged XRP holders to rethink their exit strategy ahead of what may be one of the most pivotal crypto cycles yet. Host Abdullah Nassif “Abs” issued a strong caution against selling XRP by pointing to a combination of regulatory progress and tokenization of real-world assets as signs that the current cycle may just be getting started for the XRP price. The One Rule XRP Holders Must Remember Abs amplified a sentiment shared by a speaker who stressed that XRP holders should not sell, especially not during the coming price spikes. “Hold a minimum of 10,000 units in a cold storage,” the speaker said
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/xrp-investors-grave-mistake/
